Skill Path: Magical Crafting

Crafting magical items has become second nature to you.

While developing your skills in Crafting you chose to focus specifically on Magical Crafting, learning basic techniques.You gain the following trained feats: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.voYr7ygVcWmlg1f4]{Crafter's Appraisal}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.z0HX5L7bOOrKi0dD]{Tattoo Artist}.

This path focuses on @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.rmwa3OyhTZ2i2AHl]{Craft}.

Path Progression

  • Trained: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.voYr7ygVcWmlg1f4]{Crafter's Appraisal}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.z0HX5L7bOOrKi0dD]{Tattoo Artist}
  • Expert: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{Magical Crafting}
  • Master: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.niQY3XR2VWp3GWDx]{Signature Crafting}
  • Legendary: @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.v62QzTwHOT3t86cL]{Craft Anything}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.VRCBTEyrcBf7auGz]{Legendary Tattoo Artist}
